Hi Eliane, thanks for joining. I would love to walk you through what we can offer your new lab.
Thank you, Daniel. Before we start, could you walk me through the pricing model for the embryology equipment?
Of course. The base package is one hundred twenty thousand dollars, and it includes installation and a five-year warranty.
That is helpful. Let me make sure I understand correctly. Does that price also cover the lead time and delivery?
It does. Our delivery window is eight to ten weeks, and we handle the regulatory approval paperwork with you.
Good. We might be interested in a pilot program first. Would you be open to that?
Absolutely. A pilot could work well, and if it goes well, we could discuss exclusivity for Brazil.
I would like to revisit that point later. For now, what is your best offer if we sign this quarter?
If you commit this quarter, we could take ten percent off and extend the warranty. I will send the proposal in writing.
Let me make sure I understand correctly.
What is your best offer if we sign this quarter?
We would need that in writing.
We might start with a pilot program.

Hi, I am Tom, and I lead sales for a reproductive-technology company here in Texas. Let me tell you how we usually work with a new clinic. First, we send a detailed quote with clear terms and conditions, so there are no surprises later. Our lead time is normally eight to ten weeks, and every device ships with a full warranty and the compliance documents you need for regulatory approval. Now, a quick word of advice for any buyer. Never accept the first number. It is completely normal to ask, what is your best offer, or to say, we would need a faster delivery window. A good vendor will not walk away. We expect a real negotiation. If you ask politely but firmly, you might be surprised how much flexibility there is on price and on the delivery window.

Hi Eliane, this is Karen from the sales team in Austin. Thank you for a great call earlier. I am following up with some good news about your quote. After talking to my manager, we could offer you a better deal. If you confirm the order this month, we would lower the price by ten percent and extend the warranty to seven years. Our lead time stays at eight weeks, and the delivery window is firm. I am also attaching the updated terms and conditions and the compliance documents for regulatory approval. If anything is unclear, you could call me anytime, and we might arrange a short pilot program before the full order. Talk soon, and congratulations on the new clinic.
